library_preparation_preflight.summary: Mockito core has no external service or missing Maven dependency, but native-image-reachable tests need Mockito's proxy MockMaker selected instead of the default inline Byte Buddy mock maker.
library_preparation_preflight.agent_guidance: Add a test resource `src/test/resources/mockito-extensions/org.mockito.plugins.MockMaker` containing `mock-maker-proxy` for Mockito 5.0.0, or the equivalent `org.mockito.internal.creation.proxy.ProxyMockMaker` used by the existing tests. Keep meaningful native coverage focused on interface mocks, stubbing, verification, argument matching/captors, answers, and settings that work with the proxy mock maker. Register the mocked test interfaces for dynamic proxy metadata as needed. Avoid relying on default inline/class/final mocking because it depends on Byte Buddy instrumentation/runtime agent behavior that is not a good native-image target.
risks: The proxy MockMaker can only mock interfaces, so tests that try to mock classes, final types, spies, or constructor/static mocking are likely to fail or be unsuitable for native-image coverage.

Mockito 5.0.0 already resolves `net.bytebuddy:byte-buddy`, `net.bytebuddy:byte-buddy-agent`, and `org.objenesis:objenesis` transitively; adding extra dependencies is not justified from the artifact dependency graph.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #3997 Update existing library: org.mockito:mockito-core:5.0.0; label=library-update-request; body_chars=270
